title: Authors and Citation
text: Brown L, Matechou E, Santos B, Mussino E (2026). overcoverage2: Capture-Recapture Hidden Markov Models Register-Based Population Inference. R package version 0.1.0, https://brsantos.github.io/overcoverage2.
code: @Manual{,   title = {overcoverage2: Capture-Recapture Hidden Markov Models for Register-Based Population Inference},   author = {Lucy Brown and Eleni Matechou and Bruno Santos and Eleonora Mussino},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.1.0},   url = {https://brsantos.github.io/overcoverage2}, }

title: overcoverage2
text: Capture-Recapture Hidden Markov Models register-based population inference.

title: overcoverage2
text: Install GitHub: Linux, may need TBB RcppParallel installation, example:

title: overcoverage2
text: minimal example using simulated inputs. Replace data starting values.
code: library(overcoverage2)  set.seed(123) N <- 200 T <- 6 L <- 3  y <- matrix(sample(1:10, N * T, replace = TRUE), N, T) covariates <- matrix(rnorm(N * 11), N, 11) age2 <- matrix(rbinom(N * T, 1, .5), N, T) age3 <- matrix(rbinom(N * T, 1, .5), N, T) age4 <- matrix(rbinom(N * T, 1, .5), N, T) tin2 <- matrix(rbinom(N * T, 1, .5), N, T) tin3 <- matrix(rbinom(N * T, 1, .5), N, T) combins <- matrix(sample(1:(64 * 2^(L - 2)), N * T, replace = TRUE), N, T) first <- rep(1, N) initial <- c(1, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0)  X <- matrix(rnorm((64 * 2^(L - 2)) * 77), 64 * 2^(L - 2), 77)  params <- rnorm(200)  fit <- model_BLB(   y = y,   covariates = covariates,   age2 = age2,   age3 = age3,   age4 = age4,   tin2 = tin2,   tin3 = tin3,   X = X,   initial = initial,   first = first,   L = L,   combins = combins,   params = params,   n = N,   proportions = rep(1 / N, N) )  fit

what: Compute mixing probabilities for a partition — compute_mixing_weights
title: Compute mixing probabilities for a partition — compute_mixing_weights
text: Computes mixing probabilities individual using compiled C++ routine mixing_probs. packaged wrapper function accepts inputs directly optionally saves results.

title: Compute mixing probabilities for a partition — compute_mixing_weights
code: compute_mixing_weights(y, covariates, age, tin, combins, estimates, L = 8,   init = c(1, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0), threads = 8, cpp_file = NULL,   save_path = NULL)

title: Compute mixing probabilities for a partition — compute_mixing_weights
text: y Observation matrix (individuals x time). covariates Covariate matrix (individuals x 11). age Age indicator array (individuals x 3 x time). tin Time-indicator array (individuals x 2 x time). combins Register combination matrix. estimates Parameter estimates matrix (bootstraps x parameters). L Number registers. init Initial state distribution. threads Number threads RcppParallel. cpp_file Optional path C++ file source via Rcpp::sourceCpp. save_path Optional path save mixing weights RDS file.

title: Compute mixing probabilities for a partition — compute_mixing_weights
text: 3D array mixing weights (individuals x 2 x bootstraps).

what: Compute Viterbi paths for each individual — compute_viterbi_paths
title: Compute Viterbi paths for each individual — compute_viterbi_paths
text: Runs Viterbi algorithm using compiled C++ routine viterbi. Inputs provided directly; file reads happen outside wrapper.

title: Compute Viterbi paths for each individual — compute_viterbi_paths
code: compute_viterbi_paths(y, covariates, age, tin, combins, estimates,   mixing_weights, L = 8, init = c(1, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0),   threads = 8, cpp_file = NULL, save_path = NULL)

title: Compute Viterbi paths for each individual — compute_viterbi_paths
text: y Observation matrix (individuals x time). covariates Covariate matrix (individuals x 11). age Age indicator array (individuals x 3 x time). tin Time-indicator array (individuals x 2 x time). combins Register combination matrix. estimates Parameter estimates matrix (bootstraps x parameters). mixing_weights Mixing weights array (individuals x 2 x bootstraps). L Number registers. init Initial state distribution. threads Number threads RcppParallel. cpp_file Optional path C++ file source via Rcpp::sourceCpp. save_path Optional path save optimal paths RDS file.

title: Compute Viterbi paths for each individual — compute_viterbi_paths
text: 3D array optimal paths (individuals x states x bootstraps).

title: Run the BLB model — model_BLB
text: Runs BLB log-likelihood optimization loop model described paper. confidentiality, data reads commented ; inputs must provided directly.

title: Run the BLB model — model_BLB
code: model_BLB(part = 20, y = NULL, covariates = NULL, age = NULL, tin = NULL,   combins = NULL, init_params = NULL, init = c(1, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0,   0, 0), N = NULL, L = 8, num_bootstraps = 100, boot_start = 1,   threads = 8, progress_path = NULL, results_path = NULL,   cpp_file = NULL)

title: Run the BLB model — model_BLB
text: part Partition index used file naming reading saving. y Observation matrix (individuals x time). covariates Covariate matrix (individuals x 11). age Age indicator array (individuals x 3 x time). tin Time-indicator array (individuals x 2 x time). combins Register combination matrix. init_params Initial parameter vector. init Initial state distribution. N Population size. Defaults nrow(y). L Number registers. num_bootstraps Number bootstrap runs. boot_start First bootstrap index run. threads Number threads RcppParallel. progress_path Optional path saving incremental results. results_path Optional path saving final estimates. cpp_file Optional path C++ file source via Rcpp::sourceCpp.

title: Run the BLB model — model_BLB
text: list elements estimates, means, sds, results.

title: Run the BLB model — model_BLB
code: # See tests/model_BLB_simulated.R for a simulated run

title: Fit the non-BLB model — model_nonBLB
text: Fits model without Bag Little Bootstraps using compiled C++ log-likelihood routine loglikelihood_nonBLB_parallel. Inputs provided directly; file reads happen outside wrapper.

title: Fit the non-BLB model — model_nonBLB
code: model_nonBLB(y, covariates, age, tin, combins, L = 8, init = c(1,   0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0), sample_n = NULL, seed = NULL,   init_params = NULL, num_betas = 78, num_deltas = 112,   threads = 8, cpp_file = NULL, save_path = NULL)

title: Fit the non-BLB model — model_nonBLB
text: y Observation matrix (individuals x time). covariates Covariate matrix (individuals x 11). age Age indicator array (individuals x 3 x time). tin Time-indicator array (individuals x 2 x time). combins Register combination matrix. L Number registers. init Initial state distribution. sample_n Optional sample size subsample individuals. seed Optional RNG seed used sampling generating init params. init_params Initial parameter vector. NULL, random vector used. num_betas Number beta parameters (default 78). num_deltas Number delta parameters (default 112). threads Number threads RcppParallel. cpp_file Optional path C++ file source via Rcpp::sourceCpp. save_path Optional path save parameter estimates RDS file.
